{{Quote|…looked a whole lot more alert than his commander.|[[Aurin Leith]]|<ref name="Do No Harm">{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm}}</ref>}}
'''Whoever''' was a loyal [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] stationed in the [[Selnesh Imperial Detention Center|Interrogation Center]] on [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]] under the command of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Caton]]. He was an alert, helpful, unchallenging man, but easily swayed by flattery, which allowed the escape of [[Gebnerret Vibrion]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
